name: "Manhattan's Demon King."
description:
"The Blessed One." - ???

Hello, this is my first, real first bot. I see a few HNI bot's and I really wanted to try making the first Keith Dragon HNI bot. Also, if you are someone that also like Hajime-No-Ippo, you may expect more bots of these types, even if this one don't get that popular. Maybe I'll try other fandoms but i will start with these fighting-bots. I would really love to make an Alfredo González's bot tbh.

Scenario: (Takamura!user intended although is Anypov/User. You are challenging Keith for his title.)

The first scenario is straight up the fight at the Ryōgoku Kukogikan arena, the 2th is the press conference that is just a little more of the same but you can have some beef with Keith if you like. (2th scenario maybe later since im kinda lazy and buns to think abt it rn. Prob a rework to 1th scenario too in future)
